column1: It was______windy that I couldn't stand up!
Everyone had________a good time when we went bowling that we agreed to go again!
Emma and Karen used to be______a good friends that I'm surprised they don't get on now.
I hope I've got______money to pay for this meal!
I'm sorry, but I've got_________much work to do to come to the beach today.
My mum was________angry that I knew I'd better disappear for a while.
They were_______beautiful shoes that I decided I had to get them.
The earthquake was_______powerful that the town was destroyed.
The shot was_______quick for the goalkeeper and the ball hit the back of the net.
I had_____a bad  headache that I went to lie down for a while.
